content.markdownBody:
## 📄 Arxiv 前沿论文

> **爬取时间**：2026-05-29 07:08:47 UTC

本表数据来自 Arxiv 检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl|reinforcement learning)`，时间窗口 2026-01-01 ~ 2026-01-07。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 学科类别 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|----------|
| 9 | FIRE-VLM: A Vision-Language-Driven Reinforcement Learning Framework for UAV Wildfire Tracking in a Physics-Grounded Fire Digital Twin | 提出VLM驱动的RL框架，在物理火灾数字孪生中实现无人机野火追踪，应对极端视觉退化和动态环境 | http://arxiv.org/abs/2601.03449v1 | UAV, VLM, RL, 野火追踪, 数字孪生 | 2026-01-06 | cs.RO |

## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)`，时间窗口 2026-01-01 ~ 2026-01-07。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | UAV-Based Jamming Detection for Large Language Model-Enabled Wireless Networks | 研究RL用于无人机平台检测无线网络干扰，结合LLM提升检测能力 | https://doi.org/10.1109/tcomm.2026.3669447 | UAV, 干扰检测, LLM, 无线网络 | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Transactions on Communications | 0 |
| 9 | Large Language Model-Enhanced Reinforcement Learning for Low-Altitude Economy Networking | 提出LLM增强的RL方法，优化低空经济网络的数据收集与资源分配 | https://doi.org/10.1109/mcom.001.2500343 | LLM, RL, 低空网络, 边缘计算 | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Communications Magazine | 0 |
| 9 | Large Language Model-Enhanced Deep Reinforcement Learning for Secure Data Collection in Low-Altitude Economy Networking | 研究低空网络中基于LLM深度RL的安全数据收集方案 | https://doi.org/10.1109/tmc.2026.3665241 | LLM, 深度RL, 低空网络, 安全通信 | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing | 0 |
| 8 | FIRE-VLM: A Vision-Language-Driven Reinforcement Learning Framework for UAV Wildfire Tracking in a Physics-Grounded Fire Digital Twin | 与Arxiv论文重复收录，VLM+RL框架用于无人机野火追踪 | https://openalex.org/W7119557684 | UAV, VLM, RL, 野火追踪 | 2026-01-06 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | From Large AI Models to Agentic AI: A Tutorial on Future Intelligent Communications | 综述从大模型到Agentic AI的发展及其在通信系统中的应用 | https://doi.org/10.1109/jsac.2026.3660010 | AI, Agent, 智能通信, 6G | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications | 6 |
| 7 | Edge-Cloud Collaborative Computing on Distributed Intelligence and Model Optimization: A Survey | 综述边缘云协同计算范式，涵盖分布式智能与模型优化 | https://doi.org/10.1109/comst.2026.3669216 | 边缘计算, 分布式智能, 模型优化 | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Communications Surveys & Tutorials | 12 |
| 7 | AI-Native Open RAN for Non-Terrestrial Networks: An Overview | 概述AI原生的开放无线接入网与非地面网络融合 | https://doi.org/10.1109/ojcoms.2026.3656366 | AI, Open RAN, 6G, NTN | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Open Journal of the Communications Society | 1 |
| 6 | 自动驾驶轨迹规划综述 | 中文综述，涵盖传统算法、强化学习和模仿学习的自动驾驶轨迹规划 | https://doi.org/10.11834/jig.240774 | 自动驾驶, 轨迹规划, RL, 模仿学习 | 2026-01-01 | Journal of Image and Graphics | 0 |
| 6 | 面向具身智能的视觉—语言—动作模型研究进展 | 中文综述，探讨VLA模型在机器人具身智能中的应用 | https://doi.org/10.11834/jig.250544 | VLA, 具身智能, 机器人, 多模态 | 2026-01-01 | Journal of Image and Graphics | 0 |
| 6 | Ethical Decision-Making in Autonomous Robots Using Reinforcement Learning: A Comprehensive Exploration | 探讨自主机器人中基于RL的伦理决策框架 | https://doi.org/10.36948/ijfmr.2026.v08i01.65964 | RL, 自主机器人, 伦理决策 | 2026-01-07 | International Journal For Multidisciplinary Research | 0 |
| 6 | Towards Sample-Efficient Deep Reinforcement Learning | 综述样本高效深度强化学习的研究进展 | https://openalex.org/W7160577370 | 深度RL, 样本效率, 强化学习 | 2026-01-01 | VCU Scholars Compass | 0 |
| 5 | Integrating Terrestrial and Non-Terrestrial Networks in 6G: A Review of Architectures, AI-Driven Techniques, and Sustainability Strategies | 综述6G天地一体化网络架构与AI驱动技术 | https://doi.org/10.18178/ijeetc.15.1.1-18 | 6G, NTN, AI, 天地一体化 | 2026-01-01 | International Journal of Electrical and Electronic Engineering & Telecommunications | 0 |
| 5 | A Survey on AI for 6G: Challenges and Opportunities | 综述6G网络中AI的挑战与机遇 | https://doi.org/10.1109/ojcoms.2026.3677293 | AI, 6G, 无线通信 | 2026-01-01 | IEEE Open Journal of the Communications Society | 0 |
| 5 | IDSelect: A RL-Based Cost-Aware Selection Agent for Video-based Multi-Modal Person Recognition | 提出基于RL的视频多模态人物识别成本感知选择代理 | https://openalex.org/W7131320409 | RL, 多模态识别, 视频分析 | 2026-01-01 | ArXiv.org | 0 |

sections.heading: 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索
sections.summary: 本表数据来自 GitHub 官方 `search/repositories` 在**全站公开仓库**范围内的检索结果，关键词为 `uav & (rl|llm)`，附带 `pushed` 日期条件，**不是** Trending 周榜/日榜榜单。
